_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
min_doctor_qualification: Diploma in Orthopedics with 10 years of experience
clinical_indications: Pain Worsens with walking, even with a cane or walker
Affects the patient's ability to go up or down stairs
Makes it difficult to rise from a seated position

preauth.label: Clinical notes with indication for surgery
X-ray / CT of Hip labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/Right)

claim.label: Post op X-ray showing the implant. The X-ray is labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/Right)

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes with indication for surgery present?
X-ray / CT of Hip labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/Right) present?
Pre-op X-ray of the affected hip shows an implant?

cpd_claim.q: Post op X-ray showing the implant, labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/Right) present?
Invoice / bar code of implant present?

common_queries: Clinical notes with indication for surgery are missing or incomplete.
X-ray / CT of Hip is missing or not correctly labelled with patient ID, date, or side.
Pre-op X-ray shows an implant for a primary hip replacement without justification.
Post-op X-ray / CT of hip does not show the presence of implant.
Post-op X-ray showing the implant is missing or not correctly labelled with patient ID, date, or side.
Invoice or barcode of implant is missing.
Detailed operative note is missing or incomplete.
Discharge summary is missing or incomplete.

clinical_key_pointers: Pain Worsens with walking, even with a cane or walker
Affects the patient's ability to go up or down stairs
Makes it difficult to rise from a seated position
